title: ocotea subparamicola
intro: Ocotea subparamicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as a type of tree native to Peru. The medicinal properties of Ocotea subparamicola are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like linalool and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Ocotea subparamicola include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Ocotea subparamicola can be found in the form of essential oils, capsules, or tea infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
